name: QA 1099
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1099

Check changed semantics for interpolation in the region of <mark>

records.



Also tests various pcp-iostat features (see also 851)



Copyright (c) 2016 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.

Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1099

Check changed semantics for interpolation in the region of

records.

Also tests various pcp-iostat features (see also 851)

Copyright (c) 2016 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1099

Check changed semantics for interpolation in the region of <mark>

records.



Also tests various pcp-iostat features (see also 851)



Copyright (c) 2016 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.

Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-i386-container reproduce
